summary: True Cost Accounting (TCA) is an evolving framework for measuring and valuing the positive and negative externalities of the food system. TCA seeks to make the impacts of food production, processing, distribution, and consumption more visible to support improved decision making by policymakers, farmers, and consumers.
translated_summary: True Cost Accounting (TCA) is an evolving framework for measuring and valuing the positive and negative externalities of the food system. TCA seeks to make the impacts of food production, processing, distribution, and consumption more visible to support improved decision making by policymakers, farmers, and consumers.

summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become one of the most important technologies of the 21st century. From smartphones and virtual assistants to healthcare and education, AI is transforming the way people live and work. It helps machines perform tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving and decision-making.

From smartphones and virtual assistants to healthcare and education, AI is transforming the way people live and work. It helps machines perform tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as learning, problem-solving and decision-making.

summary: Cloud computing allows on-demand access to resources without the need for local infrastructure. Cloud platforms help teams collaborate in real-time from different locations. As technology evolves, cloud-based tools will continue to enhance productivity and innovation.

input_snippet: Washington, DC — April 30, 2026 — Today, President Trump announced a new pick for surgeon general, withdrawing his nomination of Casey Means for the position. The Breakthrough Institute previously announced its opposition to Dr. Means’ nomination, citing concerns that her views represented a signifi
summary: The Breakthrough Institute previously announced its opposition to Dr. Means’ nomination. In her appearance before the Senate HELP Committee in February, Means doubled down on the need for radical shifts in food production. Means risked advancing a vision of food and farming divorced from scientific evidence.
translated_summary: The Breakthrough Institute previously announced its opposition to Dr. Means’ nomination. In her appearance before the Senate HELP Committee in February, Means doubled down on the need for radical shifts in food production. Means risked advancing a vision of food and farming divorced from scientific evidence.

input_snippet: Elias Thorne, an aging horologist whose modest shop sat nestled in the cobblestone labyrinth of old Prague, had spent his entire life coaxing life into the intricate brass hearts of pocket watches, yet nothing could have prepared him for the anomalous chronometer brought to him by a cloaked stranger
summary: Elias Thorne is an aging horologist whose modest shop sat nestled in the cobblestone labyrinth of old Prague. A cloaked stranger brought to him an anomalous chronometer that did not tick. Upon careful examination under his jeweler’s loupe, he discovered its microscopic gears were not arranged to track terrestrial hours or minutes, but instead mapped an entirely alien astronomical cycle.
translated_summary: ইলিয়াছ থৰ্ন এজন বৃদ্ধ ঘড়ীবিদ যাৰ সামান্য দোকানখন পুৰণি প্ৰাগৰ শিলৰ লেবিৰিন্থত সোমাই আছিল। পোছাক পিন্ধা এজন অচিনাকি মানুহে তেওঁৰ ওচৰলৈ লৈ আহিল এটা বিষম ক্ৰ’ন’মিটাৰ যিটোৱে টিক টিক কৰা নাছিল। তেওঁৰ জুৱেলাৰীৰ লুপৰ তলত ভালদৰে পৰীক্ষা কৰি তেওঁ আৱিষ্কাৰ কৰিলে যে ইয়াৰ অণুবীক্ষণিক গিয়াৰবোৰ স্থলজ ঘণ্টা বা মিনিট অনুসৰণ কৰিব পৰাকৈ সজোৱা হোৱা নাছিল, বৰঞ্চ সম্পূৰ্ণ বিদেশী জ্যোতিৰ্বিজ্ঞানৰ চক্ৰৰ মানচিত্ৰ নিৰ্মাণ কৰা হৈছে।

input_snippet: Elias Thorne, an aging horologist whose modest shop sat nestled in the cobblestone labyrinth of old Prague, had spent his entire life coaxing life into the intricate brass hearts of pocket watches, yet nothing could have prepared him for the anomalous chronometer brought to him by a cloaked stranger

Upon careful examination under his jeweler’s loupe, he discovered its microscopic gears were not arranged to track terrestrial hours or minutes, but instead mapped an entirely alien astronomical cycle.

input_snippet: Assi movie review: A woman walking alone in the dark. No. This cannot be real. Not in Delhi , where stepping out after dusk is an act of danger. Not in India, where predators do not spare even babies and old ladies. Anubhav Sinha’s Assi, referring to the number of rapes that take place in a minute,
summary: Anubhav Sinha’s Assi, referring to the number of rapes that take place in a minute, loses no time in plunging us into the heart of darkness. The film is at its most powerful when it stays with Parima — bodily bruises slowly healing, soul permanently scarred — and her struggle to put the trauma behind her.
translated_summary: Anubhav Sinha’s Assi, referring to the number of rapes that take place in a minute, loses no time in plunging us into the heart of darkness. The film is at its most powerful when it stays with Parima — bodily bruises slowly healing, soul permanently scarred — and her struggle to put the trauma behind her.

translated_summary: इलियास थॉर्न एक उम्रदराज ज्योतिषी हैं जिनकी मामूली सी दुकान पुराने प्राग के कोबलस्टोन भूलभुलैया में स्थित थी। एक लबादा पहने अजनबी उसके पास एक असामान्य क्रोनोमीटर लाया जो टिक नहीं रहा था। अपने जौहरी के लाउप के तहत सावधानीपूर्वक जांच करने पर, उन्होंने पाया कि इसके सूक्ष्म गियर को स्थलीय घंटों या मिनटों को ट्रैक करने के लिए व्यवस्थित नहीं किया गया था, बल्कि इसके बजाय एक पूरी तरह से विदेशी खगोलीय चक्र को मैप किया गया था।

input_snippet: Citing that the right to life “includes the right to live with dignity, right to potable water, right to sanitation, as well as right to basic medical facilities,” a Gauhati High Court bench has directed the state government and Goalpara district administration to provide these facilities, including
summary: A Gauhati High Court bench has directed the state government and Goalpara district administration to provide facilities to families displaced by an eviction in the district in June last year. The court bench of Justice Devashis Baruah made this direction while hearing a plea by sixty petitioners who had been affected by evictions carried out on June 16, 17 and 18, 2025. This eviction exercise was one of the first of several mass-scale eviction drives carried out by the Assam government.
translated_summary: A Gauhati High Court bench has directed the state government and Goalpara district administration to provide facilities to families displaced by an eviction in the district in June last year. The court bench of Justice Devashis Baruah made this direction while hearing a plea by sixty petitioners who had been affected by evictions carried out on June 16, 17 and 18, 2025. This eviction exercise was one of the first of several mass-scale eviction drives carried out by the Assam government.

input_snippet:
The choices we make on a daily basis - wearing a seatbelt, lifting heavy objects correctly
or purposely staying out of any dangerous situation - can either ensure our safety or bring about
potentially harmful circumstances.
 You and I need to make a decision that we are going to get our lives in ord
summary: The choices we make on a daily basis can either ensure our safety or bring about potentially harmful circumstances. Exercising self-control, self-discipline and establishing boundaries and borders in our lives are some of the most important things we can do. A life without discipline is one that's filled with carelessness. Each of us needs to be exactly the way we are, and we don't have to apologize for it.
translated_summary: আমি দৈনিক কৰা বাছনিবোৰে হয় আমাৰ সুৰক্ষা নিশ্চিত কৰিব পাৰে নহয় সম্ভাৱ্য ক্ষতিকাৰক পৰিস্থিতিৰ সৃষ্টি কৰিব পাৰে। আত্মনিয়ন্ত্ৰণ, আত্ম-অনুশাসন আৰু আমাৰ জীৱনত সীমা-সীমা স্থাপন কৰাটো আমি কৰিব পৰা কিছুমান গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ কাম। অনুশাসনবিহীন জীৱন হ’ল অসাৱধানতাৰে ভৰা জীৱন। আমাৰ প্ৰত্যেকেই আমি যিদৰে আছো ঠিক তেনেকুৱাই হোৱাটো প্ৰয়োজন, আৰু ইয়াৰ বাবে আমি ক্ষমা খুজিব নালাগে।

input_snippet: Paragraphs are the building blocks of papers. Many students define paragraphs in terms of length: a paragraph is a group of at least five sentences, a paragraph is half a page long, etc. In reality, though, the unity and coherence of ideas among sentences is what constitutes a paragraph. A paragraph
summary: is the building blocks of papers. Many students define paragraphs in terms of length: a paragraph is a group of at least five sentences, a paragraph is half a page long, etc. In reality, though, the unity and coherence of ideas among sentences is what constitutes a paragraph. a paragraph is defined as a group of sentences or a single sentence that forms a unit.
translated_summary: कागजों के निर्माण खंड हैं। कई छात्र पैराग्राफ को लंबाई के आधार पर परिभाषित करते हैं: एक पैराग्राफ कम से कम पांच वाक्यों का एक समूह होता है, एक पैराग्राफ आधा पृष्ठ लंबा होता है, आदि। वास्तव में, हालांकि, वाक्यों के बीच विचारों की एकता और सुसंगतता ही एक पैराग्राफ का गठन करती है। पैराग्राफ को वाक्यों के समूह या एक वाक्य के रूप में परिभाषित किया जाता है जो एक इकाई बनाता है।
